market_pulse: Breakaway Takeover dominates the weekend; Encore Beach Club hosting Major Lazer TODAY while competitors push heavy talent lineups (David Guetta, The Chainsmokers, Fabolous) driving baseline engagement.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: Major Lazer performing at Encore Beach Club TODAY (June 13)
Breakaway Takeover in full effect across Wynn properties
Competing venues saturated with A-list talent
Peak weekend demand; capacity constraints likely

weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Monitor Encore/Wynn social surge real-time; position LIV's unique positioning against mainstream takeover energy. Highlight exclusive non-festival experiences.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Encore, Hakkasan, Zouk) running heavy artist/talent teasers with 48h countdown visuals. LIV social missing same cadence.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy countdown story series for next LIV headline announcement; match competitor frequency on TikTok.

content_gaps.description: Massive Breakaway Takeover event (Fri-Sun June 12-14) features major stars. Competitors capitalizing with festival cross-promotion. LIV not participating in official lineup.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch counter-programming messaging: 'Skip the crowds, experience LIV's curated intimacy' or secure late-addition talent slot.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Zouk posting 3-5 stories/day with behind-the-scenes, artist intros, countdown. LIV's post frequency appears lower.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase daily story output (min 3/day); focus on BTS talent prep, VIP guest arrivals, production setup.
